who: Fleet Managers in Logistics Companies managing 50-100 vehicles
offer: For Fleet Managers in Logistics Companies managing 50-100 vehicles, manual tracking of maintenance schedules causes compliance penalties. We generate daily vehicle maintenance compliance reports instead of manual tracking.
problem: Ensuring vehicle maintenance compliance to avoid penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where Fleet Managers seek advice
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar challenges
DM outreach to 20-50 Fleet Managers with demo video
Community forums where Fleet Managers share tools
try_it: Let users try daily report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from potential users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Default reminder schedule options for users
CSV import feature for existing maintenance data
One-click export for simple compliance reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
